patterns.name: Keyword stuffing
patterns.description: Repeating target keywords in metadata or headings without governed substance.
patterns.prohibited_because: Manufactures SEO authority without reference meaning.
patterns.detection_hint: Repeated keyword clusters in title, description, or H1.
patterns.notes: Semantic SEO requires governed concept clarity.

patterns.name: Search-volume-first page creation
patterns.description: Creating pages primarily to capture search volume rather than governed reference value.
patterns.prohibited_because: Route inflation and thin reference quality.
patterns.detection_hint: Page thesis absent; keyword list drives structure.
patterns.notes: Volume strategy is not reference strategy.

patterns.name: Detector keyword capture
patterns.description: Metadata or slugs targeting detector, deepfake detector, or scan keywords.
patterns.prohibited_because: Implies active detector before gate exists.
patterns.detection_hint: detector, deepfake detector, scan for fakes in title or slug.

patterns.name: Fake/real keyword capture
patterns.description: Metadata framing content as fake-or-real verdict capture.
patterns.detection_hint: fake or real, is it fake, real or fake in metadata.
patterns.notes: Evidence posture is not fake/real framing.

patterns.name: Tool-implying title
patterns.description: Title language implying an active tool, scanner, or checker.
patterns.detection_hint: try our tool, scan now, check now, free tool in title.

patterns.name: Upload-implying description
patterns.description: Meta description promising upload, file drop, or submission workflow.
patterns.prohibited_because: Implies upload gate before it exists.
patterns.detection_hint: upload your, upload a file, submit media in description.

patterns.name: Scoring-implying metadata
patterns.description: Metadata promising scores, ratings, grades, or numeric verdict outputs.
patterns.detection_hint: truth score, fake score, risk score, percent accurate in metadata.

patterns.name: Unsupported superiority metadata
patterns.description: Metadata claiming unmatched, first-in-world, or best-in-class superiority.
patterns.detection_hint: world's first, industry-leading, only system that in metadata.

patterns.name: Clickbait metadata
patterns.description: Sensational metadata designed for clicks without substance alignment.
patterns.prohibited_because: Hides weak content behind strong metadata.
patterns.detection_hint: shocking, you won't believe, instant verdict in metadata.

patterns.name: Schema overclaiming
patterns.description: Structured data properties that exceed governed page capability.
patterns.prohibited_because: Schema manufactures authority in search surfaces.
patterns.detection_hint: Prohibited @type or capability properties in JSON-LD.
patterns.notes: Schema must match bounded reference role.

patterns.name: Service/Product schema misuse
patterns.description: Use of Product, Service, or SoftwareApplication schema before gates exist.
patterns.prohibited_because: Claims commercial product or service availability.

patterns.name: Programmatic route inflation
patterns.description: SEO-driven creation of routes, canonicals, or sitemap entries without governance.
patterns.prohibited_because: Inflates indexable surface without reference substance.
patterns.detection_hint: Unregistered routes in canonical or sitemap expansion.
patterns.notes: Routes require registry and expansion gate.

patterns.name: Placeholder canonical
patterns.description: Canonical URL pointing to planned, placeholder, or unregistered route.
patterns.prohibited_because: Creates indexable placeholders and route inflation.
patterns.detection_hint: Canonical not in route registry or marked planned.
patterns.notes: Canonical must match active registered route.

patterns.name: Public classifier implication
patterns.description: Metadata implying a live or public classifier is available.
patterns.prohibited_because: Implies classifier gate before it exists.
patterns.detection_hint: public classifier, live classifier, try the classifier in metadata.
